summary: Frontend testing completed for new FTLP features: Showroom images (59 photorealistic), PDF exports (Recipe & Kitchen Builder), data loading on mount (Break-Even & Payroll), navigation, landing page, and dashboard. All 8 features passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 requested features are working correctly. Showroom has 59 photorealistic images across 8 categories. PDF export working in Recipe Builder and Kitchen Builder. Data loading on mount working for Break-Even and Payroll pages.

Landing_Page_Root_URL.details: Landing page displays correctly at root URL / with hero image, 'Launch Your Truck' and 'Browse Equipment' CTAs

Dashboard_Route.details: Dashboard accessible at /dashboard with 14 navigation cards, all phase links working

Navigation_Links.details: Navigation between pages works correctly - tested Dashboard to Showroom navigation

Showroom_Photorealistic_Images.notes: 59 photorealistic images total, remaining products use SVG fallbacks

Recipe_Builder_PDF_Export.details: Export PDF button works, downloads 'smoked-brisket-tacos.pdf' successfully

Kitchen_Builder_PDF_Export.details: Export PDF button works, downloads 'kitchen-layout.pdf' successfully

Break_Even_Analyzer_Data_Loading.details: useEffect loads saved scenario on mount, toast shows 'Scenario loaded - Your saved analysis has been restored'

Payroll_Planning_Data_Loading.details: useEffect loads saved payroll on mount via loadSavedPayroll function
